Name:
YE-I
(by damn james! & Gabe Shaddow)
(BULLY [V0], Ye (i))
Notes:
(10/16/2023) (The YE-I album is created)
(02/23/2025) (YE-I is uploaded to YouTube by damn james!)
(11/23/2025) (damn james! fails to drop an updated version on his SoundCloud)
Leak Date: Fully AI album made by damn james! and Gabe Shaddow in October 2023. Was completely unknown until damn james! revealed it existed and played the full album on his Instagram Live November 22nd, 2025. Somehow, Ye never knew the album existed. There's an official cover but it's dogshit, so we use this one made by the goat Nicole/Suzy.
